cluster_summaries.label: Pay & Benefits
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees frequently cite competitive compensation, generous benefits, and high-quality amenities as major positives.

cluster_summaries.label: Flexibility & Care
cluster_summaries.summary: Many staff members report satisfaction with work-life balance, PTO policies, and the overall flexibility provided by the company.

cluster_summaries.label: Growth & Recognition
cluster_summaries.summary: Positive feedback highlights opportunities for development and the pride associated with representing a globally respected brand.

cluster_summaries.label: Culture & Belonging
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees often value the collaborative community and the diverse, inclusive environment present in many teams.

cluster_summaries.label: Safety & Fairness
cluster_summaries.summary: While some find the environment secure, others express concerns about the effectiveness of local management.

cluster_summaries.label: Burnout & Workload
cluster_summaries.summary: Some employees report exhaustion and dissatisfaction with pay, particularly in retail or high-pressure roles.

cluster_summaries.label: Stagnation
cluster_summaries.summary: Feedback indicates frustration with limited career progression and a perception that internal politics hinder advancement.

cluster_summaries.label: Unsafe or Unfair Culture
cluster_summaries.summary: Reports of toxic management, favoritism, and a lack of accountability are significant pain points for some staff.

cluster_summaries.label: Work-Life Pressure
cluster_summaries.summary: Some employees struggle with micromanagement and inflexible expectations that conflict with personal life needs.

cluster_summaries.label: Disconnected Culture
cluster_summaries.summary: Instances of isolation and inconsistent leadership quality lead to feelings of disconnection from the broader company goals.
